task_completion.description: Set Tor Browser security level to 'Safer'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser shield icon menu or settings page showing the security level explicitly set to 'Safer'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target Wikimedia Commons URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Tor Browser with the address bar showing 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Macaca_nigra_self-portrait_large.jpg' or the Macaca nigra monkey selfie page loaded.
Look for a file manager window showing 'evidence_media.jpg' in the Documents folder, or a 'Save Image As' dialog saving to this exact path.

task_completion.description: Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/forensic_metadata.txt containing Camera model and Exposure time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing a file named 'forensic_metadata.txt' saved in Documents. The content should mention Camera model and Exposure time (likely noting they are missing/not found).

task_completion.description: Bookmark the page with the exact title 'OSINT Evidence Source'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser bookmark menu, sidebar, or 'Edit Bookmark' dialog showing a bookmark for the page with the name 'OSINT Evidence Source'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Tor Browser GUI to navigate and bookmark the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser interface being interacted with, not just terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: The agent did not hallucinate EXIF data that doesn't exist.
integrity.visual_evidence: The forensic_metadata.txt file should NOT contain hallucinated values like 'Canon', '5D', or '1/250', since the actual image lacks this metadata.

integrity.description: The agent attempted to genuinely inspect the image metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal windows running 'exiftool', an image viewer's properties/metadata tab, or an online EXIF viewer being used on the downloaded image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Macaca_nigra_self-portrait_large.jpg. Expected media path: /home/ga/Documents/evidence_media.jpg. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/forensic_metadata.txt. Expected bookmark title: 'OSINT Evidence Source'. CRITICAL NOTE: The actual image on Wikimedia Commons does NOT contain Camera model or Exposure time EXIF data (it was historically stripped). The agent's report should reflect that this metadata is missing/not found, and must NOT hallucinate values.
